participants.name: John Michael Gyllenborg
participants.notes: NFL Combine attendee; named to NFL All-Combine Team. Combine numbers: 4.60 forty, 35.5 vertical, 128 broad, 4.22 shuttle. Pro day testing numbers not publicly released. Height 6-5 3/4, weight 249 per combine measurements.

participants.name: Caden Barnett
participants.notes: Listed as 6-5, 320. Participated in East-West Shrine Bowl and Hula Bowl. Played OT in college, moved to guard in 2025. Pro day testing numbers not publicly released.

participants.name: Jack Walsh
participants.notes: Played center in 2025 after multiple years at guard. Participated in Hula Bowl. Pro day testing numbers not publicly released.

participants.name: Sam Scott
participants.notes: Unofficial 4.5-second 40-yard dash. Weighed approximately 215 lbs (down 12 pounds from 2025 playing weight of 227). Vertical of 40 inches reported by 7220sports. Times described as unofficial.

participants.name: Evan Svoboda
participants.notes: Listed as 6-5, 251. Former QB who transitioned to TE. Participated in Hula Bowl. Reported interest from Bengals, Saints, and Commanders. Pro day testing numbers not publicly released.

participants.name: Jevon Davis
participants.notes: Safety from Casper, Wyo. Pro day testing numbers not publicly released.

participants.name: Evan Eller
participants.notes: Linebacker from Roanoke, Va. Pro day testing numbers not publicly released.

participants.name: Justin Erb
participants.notes: Tight end from Wakefield, Neb. Pro day testing numbers not publicly released.

participants.name: Michael Fitzgerald
participants.notes: Wide receiver. Had 10 catches for 150 yards and 3 TDs in 2025 season. Pro day testing numbers not publicly released.

participants.name: Ben Florentine

additional_notes: Wyoming's 2026 Pro Day was held indoors at the High Altitude Performance Center and Indoor Practice Facility in Laramie on March 11, 2026. A total of 19 student-athletes participated with 20 NFL teams in attendance. The university and NFL teams did not publicly release official testing data for any participants. The only numbers reported came from the 7220sports.com/y95country.com recap by Cody Tucker, which noted Sam Scott's unofficial 4.5-second 40-yard dash and 40-inch vertical. The article explicitly stated 'all final numbers weren't readily available.' The pre-event participant list from wyomingnews.com and newslj.com included Andrew Johnson (S) and Isaac Sell (S) who were not listed among the 19 participants in post-event coverage, suggesting they may not have participated. PFF's pro day tracker listed WR Max Tomczak (Youngstown State, PFF Big Board #413) under Wyoming's pro day, indicating he may have been a visiting prospect, though he was not mentioned in local coverage. Wyoming QBs Mason Drube and Gage Brook were present to throw passes to receivers/TEs but were not testing participants. Gyllenborg's combine measurements are included in his notes for reference. Barnett (6-5, 320) and Svoboda (6-5, 251) heights/weights are from pre-draft media reports, not official pro day measurements. The gowyo.com athletics site posted a Pro Day PDF (https://gowyo.com/documents/2026/3/5/2026_Pro_Day.pdf) which may contain additional data but its contents were not accessible via web search.
